strengths: Deep and diverse full-stack experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, D, etc.) with a strong focus on clean, testable code
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and code generation frameworks
Strong background in scalable systems (handling millions of requests, Kubernetes deployments) and user-centric product development
concerns: Recent career gap (Oct 2025–Present) with no clear explanation provided
Overlap with primary stack is strong (TypeScript/Node.js/React) but secondary skills (Kotlin/Java) are not prominently featured in recent roles
Limited explicit experience with Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL in the resume despite required technical skills

key_factors.factor: Career gap and recency of relevant experience

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional versatility in full-stack development with a strong emphasis on clean architecture and user experience, particularly in AI-agent tooling. His experience aligns well with the senior full-stack role, though the unexplained career gap and limited visibility of recent work with the required stack (Nest.js, Vitest, PostgreSQL) introduce some uncertainty. His proven ability to handle high-scale systems and collaborate across technical stacks makes him a compelling candidate despite these concerns.
